text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Neither Narita Taishin nor Winning<n>Ticket manage
to conquer the<n>Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite having her dream crushed,<n>Winning Ticket
is still looking forward<n>to the next race, and Narita
Taishin is<n>left deeply impressed by such
determination.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication<n>to keep
pushing on, so she can seize<n>victory at the final
race of the Triple<n>Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
